title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. ramulatum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. ramulatum, also known as the hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, hawkweed is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
